title: CBB Rulebook Volume 5 Financing Companies Operational Risk Management Module OM-4.9 Cyber Security Risk Management
summary: Applies cybersecurity risk management obligations to financing companies within operational risk and business continuity controls, including governance and cybersecurity framework requirements.

theme_notes.cybersecurity.security_controls_framewor: Cybersecurity risk management rules for financing company licensees.

notes: Related instruments: Related to CBB Appendix A Cyber Security Control Guidelines
